_comment: NHP colony-origin discovery patterns for SEND TS/SUPPDM/TSVAL. Sponsor-extensible — add new TSPARMCD/QNAM codes or country tokens without code changes. F11 of species-magnitude-thresholds-dog-nhp.

tsparmcd_regex._note: Curated allowlist + (?!ORIGINATOR) negative-lookahead to exclude the CRO/study-originator case. Bare (ORIGIN|SOURCE) substring match is rejected as it also captures FUNDINGSOURCE, DATASOURCE, SOURCEDATA, SOURCEORG, RESOURCES — all non-animal-origin semantics.

suppdm_qnam_regex._note: Same pattern as tsparmcd_regex — SUPPDM.QNAM carries the same sponsor codes as TS.TSPARMCD.

_tsval_note: Applied ONLY after TSPARMCD and SUPPDM paths fail. Token match is word-boundary and case-insensitive. Only GEOGRAPHIC tokens belong here -- breeding-method tokens (PURPOSE-BRED, WILD-CAUGHT, etc.) are deliberately excluded: they describe husbandry, not origin, and inclusion would emit origin_captured=true with origin_match=unknown, producing a misleading 'HCD match uncertainty elevated' banner for studies that actually carry no geographic information. Honest-uncertainty principle: no geography found -> origin_captured=false -> neutral banner.
_hcd_reference_note: HCD reference origin for the Amato 2022 NHP colony is Mauritius. origin_match = 'same' when captured origin canonicalises to MAURITIUS; 'different' for any other captured country; 'unknown' when multiple conflicting sources match or origin is ambiguous.
